business_hours.notes: Website says 8am-4:30pm. Ben confirmed 'pretty much 8 to 5'. Using 08:00-17:00.

call_routing_setup.current_phase: Conditional forwarding — Android forwards to Clara only if Ben does not answer or declines
call_routing_setup.future_phase: Once second number active, Clara is first point of contact and transfers to Ben's second number
call_routing_setup.second_number_status: Pending — Ben to provide via email reply
call_routing_setup.inbound_scope: New clients, small jobs, service call inquiries only. Existing contractors call field team directly.

pricing_policy.clara_mention_policy: Only mention pricing if caller specifically asks. Do NOT proactively bring it up.

integration_constraints: Jobber integration with Clara listed as coming soon
emergency_definition: After-hours emergency = call from GNM Pressure Washing / Shelley Manley regarding gas station fault
GNM manages approx. 20 Chevron and SOS gas stations in Calgary
All other after-hours callers = non-emergency, collect details, follow up next business day

vip_emergency_client.properties: Approx. 20 Chevron and SOS gas stations, Calgary area
vip_emergency_client.action: Patch call through to Ben immediately regardless of time

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: If transfer fails: apologise, collect name/number/address, assure Ben will call back ASAP

non_emergency_routing_rules.business_hours: Collect name, phone, job type, preferred date/time. Send email + SMS to Ben.
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours_non_emergency: Collect name, phone, job description. Confirm follow-up Monday-Friday 8am-5pm.
non_emergency_routing_rules.existing_contractors: Not handled by Clara — call field team directly

call_transfer_rules.transfer_number: Ben's second personal number — PENDING, Ben to provide via email
call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: I wasn't able to reach Ben directly right now. I've noted all your details and he will follow up with you as soon as possible.

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet. Ask purpose. If GNM or gas station emergency: collect name/number/address, patch to Ben immediately. All others: non-emergency, collect details, confirm next-business-day follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet. Ask purpose. Collect name, phone, job description, preferred date/time. Send email+SMS to Ben. Only mention $115 call-out + $98/hr pricing if caller asks.
questions_or_unknowns: Ben's second personal phone number for transfers (Ben to email back)
Office billing address (never confirmed in either call)
Call transfer timeout — defaulting to 30s pending confirmation
notes: Onboarding by Pawan (co-founder). Base agent already configured before call. Key items confirmed: conditional Android forwarding, pricing only on request, one VIP after-hours client (GNM/Shelley Manley, gas stations). Friday 2pm follow-up for dashboard walkthrough. Go-live target: weekend after Friday call.
